title: The Ruins Point Toward the Bell
description: Luffy’s path to Enel is delayed inside the giant snake, while outside, Enel’s plan moves closer to completion.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Luffy, Eneru, Nola, Enel, Nami. Luffy’s path to Enel is delayed inside the giant snake, while outside, Enel’s plan moves closer to completion.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: How can he know where I am...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: It's like he can see through walls!

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: DIE, INTRUDER FROM THE BLUE SEA!

summary: Luffy’s path to Enel is delayed inside the giant snake, while outside, Enel’s plan moves closer to completion.
